---
title: "Disposition Summary"
subtitle: "Disposition - Treatment or Follow-up Summary"
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
---


```{r}
#| label: prereqs
#| include: false
library(arframe)
fr_theme(hlines = "header", font_family = "Courier New")
```

## Setup

See [Prerequisites](../install.qmd) for installation instructions.

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(arframe)
library(pharmaverseadam)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(tidyr)
library(cards)

blank_to_na <- function(df) {
  df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
    x
  })
  df
}

adsl_saf <- pharmaverseadam::adsl |>
  blank_to_na() |>
  filter(SAFFL == "Y", TRT01A != "Screen Failure")

arm_levels <- c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")
arm_n      <- setNames(
  vapply(arm_levels, function(a) sum(adsl_saf$TRT01A == a), integer(1L)),
  arm_levels
)

# pharmaverseadam::adsl has no DCSREAS column; only EOSSTT is available.
# Discontinuation reasons cannot be broken down further from this dataset.
```


## Data Preparation

::: {.panel-tabset}

### dplyr

```{r}
#| label: dplyr-code
N_total <- nrow(adsl_saf)

# ── Helper: n (%) for a logical flag per arm + Total ──
flag_row <- function(data, flag_expr, row_label, category) {
  flag_expr <- rlang::enquo(flag_expr)
  by_arm <- data |>
    group_by(TRT01A) |>
    summarise(
      n   = sum(!!flag_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      N   = n(),
      pct = sprintf("%d (%.1f)", n, n / N * 100),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    select(TRT01A, pct) |>
    pivot_wider(names_from = TRT01A, values_from = pct)

  total_n <- sum(rlang::eval_tidy(flag_expr, data = data), na.rm = TRUE)
  by_arm |>
    mutate(
      category   = category,
      stat_label = row_label,
      Total      = sprintf("%d (%.1f)", total_n, total_n / N_total * 100),
      .before    = 1
    )
}

# ── Enrolled: count subjects per arm directly ──
enrolled_counts <- adsl_saf |>
  count(TRT01A) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = TRT01A, values_from = n)

enrolled_row <- enrolled_counts |>
  mutate(
    category   = "Enrolled",
    stat_label = "Enrolled",
    Total      = sprintf("%d", N_total),
    across(all_of(arm_levels), ~ sprintf("%d", .x)),
    .before    = 1
  )

# ── Randomized ──
rand_row <- flag_row(adsl_saf, !is.na(TRT01A), "Randomized", "Randomized")

# ── Completed ──
completed_row <- flag_row(
  adsl_saf,
  EOSSTT == "COMPLETED",
  "Completed",
  "Completed"
)

# ── Discontinued ──
# pharmaverseadam::adsl has no DCSREAS column so per-reason rows are omitted.
disc_header <- flag_row(
  adsl_saf,
  EOSSTT == "DISCONTINUED",
  "Discontinued",
  "Discontinued"
)

# ── Combine ──
disp_wide <- bind_rows(
  enrolled_row,
  rand_row,
  completed_row,
  disc_header
) |>
  mutate(across(
    all_of(c(arm_levels, "Total")),
    ~ replace_na(.x, "0 (0.0)")
  ))

# Enrolled/Randomized rows show plain counts (no percentage)
disp_wide <- disp_wide |>
  mutate(across(
    all_of(c(arm_levels, "Total")),
    ~ if_else(.x == "0 (0.0)" & stat_label %in% c("Enrolled", "Randomized"),
              "0", .x)
  ))

n_vec <- c(arm_n, Total = N_total)
```

### cards

```{r}
#| label: cards-code

# cards works best with a single categorical variable.
# Build a derived disposition status variable.
adsl_disp <- adsl_saf |>
  mutate(
    DISP_CAT = case_when(
      EOSSTT == "COMPLETED"    ~ "Completed",
      EOSSTT == "DISCONTINUED" ~ "Discontinued",
      is.na(EOSSTT)            ~ "Ongoing",
      TRUE                     ~ "Other"
    )
  )

disp_ard <- ard_stack(
  data   = adsl_disp,
  .by    = "TRT01A",
  ard_categorical(variables = "DISP_CAT"),
  .overall = TRUE
)

# Note: cards output uses variable/stat_label vs dplyr's category/stat_label
disp_cards <- fr_wide_ard(
  disp_ard,
  statistic = list(categorical = "{n} ({p}%)"),
  decimals  = c(p = 1),
  label     = c(DISP_CAT = "Disposition")
)
```

:::


## arframe Pipeline

The rendered table below uses the **dplyr** data prep (`disp_wide`). The cards tab produces an equivalent `disp_cards` — swap it in to use the cards path instead.

```{r}
#| label: pipeline
#| eval: false
disp_wide |>
  fr_table() |>
  fr_titles(
    "Table 14.1.3",
    "Disposition - Treatment or Follow-up Summary",
    "Safety Population"
  ) |>
  fr_cols(
    category   = fr_col(visible = FALSE),
    stat_label = fr_col("", width = 2.8),
    !!!setNames(
      lapply(arm_levels, function(a) fr_col(a, align = "decimal")),
      arm_levels
    ),
    Total = fr_col("Total", align = "decimal"),
    .n = n_vec
  ) |>
  fr_header(bold = TRUE, align = "center") |>
  fr_rows(
    group_by    = list(cols = "category", label = "stat_label"),
    blank_after = "category"
  ) |>
  fr_styles(fr_row_style(rows = bold_rows, bold = TRUE)) |>
  fr_footnotes(
    "Percentages based on N per treatment group.",
    "Discontinued includes all subjects who did not complete the study.",
    "CDISCPILOT01 Safety Population."
  )
```


## Rendered Table

```{r}
#| label: pre-render
#| include: false

# Bold rows: "Completed" and "Discontinued" category headers
bold_rows <- which(disp_wide$stat_label %in% c("Completed", "Discontinued"))
```

```{r}
#| label: rendered-table
#| echo: false
#| ref.label: pipeline
```
